title: S + object to / be opposed to + V-ing
explanation: 「object to」和「be opposed to」皆表示反對，其後接動名詞（V-ing），其中 to 為介系詞而非不定詞符號。兩者意義相同但用法略異：object to 為動詞片語，be opposed to 為形容詞片語。使用時機為表達立場反對、反抗某行為或計畫。易混淆點是誤將 to 視為不定詞符號，導致接原形動詞。注意 object 為及物動詞，需搭配 to；be opposed to 中 opposed 為過去分詞作形容詞。

examples.eng: Many parents object to their children spending too much time on social media.
examples.chi: 許多父母反對他們的孩子花太多時間在社群媒體上。

examples.eng: The government is opposed to raising taxes during the economic recession.
examples.chi: 政府反對在經濟衰退期間提高稅收。

examples.eng: I don't object to changing the meeting time if everyone agrees.
examples.chi: 如果每個人都同意，我不反對改變會議時間。

examples.eng: The local residents are strongly opposed to building a factory near their community.
examples.chi: 當地居民強烈反對在他們社區附近建工廠。

extension.tip: 判斷句型的關鍵是識別「object to」或「be opposed to」之後必接 V-ing 形式，而非動詞不定詞。常見錯誤是寫成「object to do」或「opposed to do」，應改為「object to doing」和「opposed to doing」。記住 to 是介系詞，不是不定詞符號。

examples.test: ❌ The company objects to increase production costs.
examples.result: → ✓ The company objects to increasing production costs.（增加改為V-ing形式）

examples.test: ❌ They are opposed to accept the new policy.
examples.result: → ✓ They are opposed to accepting the new policy.（接受改為V-ing形式）

examples.test: ✓ We don't object to postponing the event.
examples.result: → 正確用法：「postpone」變為 V-ing 形式 「postponing」

extension.note: 記憶口訣：「反對to的後面是-ing，不是原形動詞do。」

parts: students copying answers from each other during the exam.
exercises.sentence: The teachers object to students copying answers from each other during the exam.
exercises.translation: 老師們反對學生在考試中互相抄襲答案。

exercises.sentence: Many environmentalists are opposed to using harmful chemicals in agricultural production.
exercises.translation: 許多環保人士反對在農業生產中使用有害化學物質。

parts: the original plan if we find a better solution?
exercises.sentence: Do you object to changing the original plan if we find a better solution?
exercises.translation: 如果我們找到更好的方案，你反對改變原計畫嗎？

parts: a new shopping mall in the residential area.
exercises.sentence: The local community is opposed to constructing a new shopping mall in the residential area.
exercises.translation: 當地社區反對在住宅區興建新商場。

vocab_table.zh: 強烈地（副詞修飾反對程度）

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的動詞片語形式，完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The coach _______ his players drinking alcohol before important games.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。「object to + V-ing」是固定片語，表示「反對做某事」。coach 反對球員在重要比賽前喝酒，to 為介系詞而非不定詞符號，後接動名詞 drinking。B、C、D 的介系詞搭配皆不符合 object 的用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的形容詞片語，表達政府立場
mc_exercises.question_eng: The government is _______ new environmental regulations that would increase production costs.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。「be opposed to + V-ing」表示「反對做某事」，opposed 為形容詞，to 為介系詞。句子主詞是 government，需用被動形式 is opposed to。B 誤用不定詞；C 的介系詞錯誤；D 誤用動詞 oppose 而非形容詞 opposed。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷兩個反對片語的正確用法區別
mc_exercises.question_eng: Many local residents _______ the construction of a shopping mall in their neighborhood, and city officials are _______ it as well.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。第一空需動詞片語 object to + V-ing（object to building），主詞 residents 為複數。第二空需形容詞片語 be opposed to + V-ing（are opposed to building），搭配 are。B 時態與片語搭配均錯；C 均缺少 to 介系詞；D 文法結構錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句式中的片語應用與時態轉換
mc_exercises.question_eng: Although the proposal had been discussed for months, the board still _______ and the union leaders were _______ any changes to the current work agreement.

options.text: objected to accepting it / opposed to implementing
were objecting to accept it / opposed to implement
objected to accept it / were opposed implementing
object to accepting it / opposed implementing

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。第一空用過去簡單式 objected to accepting it（board 為單數，反對接受它），to 為介系詞。第二空用被動形式 were opposed to implementing（union leaders 為複數，反對實施改變），to 為介系詞。B 的 accept 應為 accepting；C 缺少 to 介系詞；D 時態與介系詞用法皆錯。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我的父母反對我熬夜讀書。
translation_exercises.answer: My parents object to my staying up late to study. / My parents are opposed to my staying up late to study.
key_points: object to / be opposed to 後接 V-ing
my staying up late（所有格 + V-ing）
to study 為不定詞表示目的
hints: 句型框架：S + object to + V-ing，注意 to 是介系詞不是不定詞符號
常見錯誤：誤寫成 object to stay 或 opposed to stay（錯誤地用原形動詞）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師反對學生在課堂上使用手機。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher objects to students using mobile phones in class. / The teacher is opposed to students using mobile phones in class.
key_points: object to / be opposed to 後接 V-ing
students using（主詞 + V-ing 構成動名詞片語）
in class 時間地點副詞片語
hints: 句型框架：S + object to + V-ing，V-ing 前的名詞可用所有格或主詞形式
注意：students using 中 students 為動名詞的邏輯主詞，用主詞形式而非所有格也可接受

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 環保人士反對在這片森林裡建造新的住宅開發區。
translation_exercises.answer: Environmental activists are opposed to building a new residential development in this forest. / Environmental activists object to building a new residential development in this forest.
key_points: be opposed to + V-ing 形容詞片語結構
building a new residential development（複雜動名詞片語帶受詞）
in this forest 地點介系詞片語修飾
hints: 句型框架：S + be opposed to + V-ing，be opposed to 為形容詞片語，V-ing 後可接複雜受詞結構
注意：building 後接 a new residential development（受詞），整體構成複雜的動名詞片語

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 儘管許多公民反對提高學費，政府仍然決定實施這項政策。
translation_exercises.answer: Although many citizens object to raising tuition fees, the government still decided to implement this policy. / Despite many citizens being opposed to raising tuition fees, the government still decided to implement this policy.
key_points: object to / be opposed to 在讓步子句中的應用
raising tuition fees（V-ing 片語帶受詞）
対比句型結構（讓步 + 主要子句）
hints: 句型框架可置於讓步子句：Although S + object to + V-ing, main clause；或 Despite S + being opposed to + V-ing
注意：be opposed to 在讓步子句時需加 being 以形成完整片語；object to 則直接接 V-ing
